title: . Eligibility for apprenticeship. Subject to the appropriate provisions of this Code, handicapped
content:
. Eligibility for apprenticeship. Subject to the appropriate provisions of this Code, handicapped 
workers may be hired as apprentices or learners if their handicap is not such as to effectively impede the 
performance of job operations in the particular occupations for which they are hired. 
14 
Downloaded from the Department of Labor and Employment, Republic of the Philippines - 29 September 2011  
http://www.dole.gov.ph/labor_codes.php?id=34

CONDITIONS OF EMPLOYMENT
